overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a post-apocalyptic desert landscape at sunset. The character walks through sand dunes approaching a ruined Eiffel Tower replica in the Las Vegas ruins, then enters a derelict urban area with collapsed buildings and overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail alongside ruined casino structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy path with a bow on her back, moving toward the distant tower landmark

entered.detail: large collapsed building with overhanging roof sections and exposed framework
tall lattice metal tower resembling the Eiffel Tower standing in the distance
scattered palm trees growing from the sand dunes
rippled sand surface with patches of dry grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a desert trail beside a massive ruined casino structure on the left. The warm golden hour light illuminates the scene as the Eiffel Tower replica stands visible in the distance ahead. Sparse palm trees dot the sandy landscape as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sand dunes approaching urban ruins

events.description: camera faces directly into the setting sun creating intense lens flare and warm glow

agents.ego_description: jogging through open dunes while circling toward the tower and the ruined district beyond

entered.detail: cluster of damaged modern buildings and collapsed structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving into open dunes, the character arcs left around the tower while approaching a ruined urban district on the right. The lighting shifts to direct sunlight causing lens flare as the camera faces the setting sun. The casino structure and palm trees fall behind as the terrain opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: collapsed urban ruins with damaged building facades

events.description: entering the enclosed area of ruined buildings as the tower passes out of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages between collapsed buildings and damaged structures

entered.detail: damaged building walls with broken windows and exposed rebar

segments.scene_description: The character enters the ruined urban area, moving from open dunes into a semi-enclosed space surrounded by collapsed buildings. The tower disappears behind the structures as the environment becomes more confined with damaged facades and debris. The lighting becomes more diffused as the buildings cast shadows across the sandy ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden desert landscape that transitions from a trail beside ruins into an open expanse of dunes. It begins with Aloy walking along a sandy path flanked by a massive ruined casino structure, with the Eiffel Tower replica visible in the distance under warm golden hour light. As the character moves forward past sparse palm trees, the camera arcs left around the tower and the terrain opens up into wide dunes. The scene then shifts toward a ruined urban district on the right, while the lighting changes to direct sunlight that creates a lens flare as the camera faces the setting sun.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from the open expanse of the desert into the claustrophobic ruins of a derelict city. It begins with the character leaving the wide sand dunes and entering a semi-enclosed urban space surrounded by collapsed buildings. As the camera advances, the distant tower gradually disappears behind the crumbling structures, and the environment becomes increasingly confined by damaged facades and scattered debris. The scene then shifts in atmosphere as the bright sunset light fades, becoming more diffused while the towering ruins cast deep shadows across the sandy ground.
